textByHash.c8fdd0644bd9c43e945231cbdb90f94b766779bd: I think I can, but I'm going to need to be on top of my game for a job like this. In other words, I'm going to need some tea.
textByHash.7cdd0ca4ea1315205fd07e3f914b789b0b170205: Kuani! There are plenty of damiana shrubs around here. I know of some just on the other side of the eastern wall. They make for the best tea. I like mine without any milk.
textByHash.030b548dd4b8dfb07e255fc37a1e6e2642237033: Now, I trust you know how to make tea?
textByHash.c8481b773235b927b16c61fd13910d2aeaa9e000: You'll need to take the damiana leaves and add them to a bowl of water. You then need to boil the water before transferring the tea into a cup.
textByHash.5ffb1d63f813a60b5a774dbc22ecf7239b3e8a96: Very good, iknami. In that case, I'll be here once you have some tea for me.
textByHash.83d55a3f632ef1fe8dea21a42a2b9a6236db2db6: Well, I don't think I'll be much use without it...
textByHash.50300b04b73c3c6db9252564bacd5fbe7eb80439: Ah, I remember. Unfortunately, I still don't think I'll be much help until I've had my tea...
textByHash.e00f83af0440bf1f040c93d149cc318c4e6ed7a9: How are you getting on with that tea?
textByHash.9e5a07c1c884e5c29a1f5352d88149d3098cdd27: Remember, you want leaves from damiana shrubs. I know of some just on the other side of the eastern wall. I assume you know what to do once you have them?
textByHash.40e57e075552fa3288e8e98f30eea6bbb168ec5a: Of course, if you have the space to carry it.
textByHash.0a146eb7ad5d04beb18c07f522af96a03ec535fa: Kuani! Would you mind putting it in a cup for me?
textByHash.40863ac38febd06039a52cd21073247aff74d7c1: Hmm... doesn't smell much like my usual tea...
textByHash.de4c39ad7925647c221654de45fd796a475efafc: Remember, you want leaves from damiana shrubs. I know of some just on the other side of the eastern wall.
textByHash.8a12183111aa44850a4253884f3547fcc1511066: Wonderful. I'll just have that, then we can get to work on this Humphrey Dumphrey.
textByHash.02aeb1c36c2ad0b51a7b0ea3c54411268e5d97b7: That's what I said. Where is he?
textByHash.0694e243069be9840fbbd6b1002040d490e99f78: Okay, I'll meet you over there.
textByHash.ae97536b593a6723f29b54669aa4e1003e4d8d3b: This isn't good, iknami. We don't think there's any way we can put this egg back together again.
textByHash.59c057b83230f160b7f95479ac39554f1d3b5472: Tetamo! That's preposterous! A chicken egg is far too small.
textByHash.041db14b8166b4c26558c6c9b787aa905d63fb9e: A dragon egg would be suicide. No dragon would willingly give up its egg. What we need is a jaguar egg.
textByHash.ca4cbb943dfe957b717734b5d79af68335b604a1: And I've heard talk of some eggs in an old camp site by the mine east of Tal Teklan. Apparently the camp site is a hot spot for jaguars! They must be jaguar eggs!
textByHash.d4369947e699c4bcd8b9dec32123272bca82ec7e: I've heard talk of some in an old camp site by the mine east of Tal Teklan.
textByHash.2200a5e47d2b9832af6cdaa670e51e2b9331837b: Kuani! I'll get it set up and ready to be judged.
textByHash.b82d3d82d3ab3ad08533f0a748206cb3ee78929f: The jaguar egg is all set up and ready to be judged. You should work on gathering the other eggs.
textByHash.1465dea1ed1425635b5bb2e6ef27fdffde09014f: We've prettied them up as best we can. Hopefully one of them looks like Scrumpty Lumpy.
textByHash.95110966765fc4edfff5d5eb79f5c5d8fdf1d2df: The jaguar egg then? It's a perfect size and it's the right temperature.
textByHash.8f1918c7ddd7d8cb693663bc51ad101f7a5f4d16: Kuani! Good work everyone. I think we've done it!
textByHash.d3000e39be46acd0c66018421c0f42c2f0a01e87: We don't have any other options. We have to try.
textByHash.d865715f00e9c393ae2de5d67a37c5d406190fbd: Don't mention it, iknami. Always happy to be of service.
textByHash.3248adba2b7f08d1afa4edebe05e0174a318c9ee: Sorry, but I'm busy right now.
textByHash.0e6b7fb4285200a54a3ca925d33df50bbd75610a: Hello there! Nice weather we've been having.
